conservative.name: Quickgrowth
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
Within medium range of target, on soil or similar surface. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Flailing vines reach out of the earth to capture your target, trapping him where he stands. While this card is recharging, the target cannot spend manoeuvres to move
As above, and the thorny vines inflict 2 wounds

chaosStar.description: The spell has gone too far! Another set of vines grow out of the ground engaged with you. They are attached to a very large, very hungry plant! It becomes a monster with statistics and abilities identical to a Giant Spider, and attacks. When the card is done recharging, the creature disappears

reckless.name: Quickblight
reckless.requirements:
3 Power
Target within medium range, not engaged with enemy

bane.description: Every creature (including you) touched by the haze gains 1 corruption

chaosStar.description: The Ruinous Powers delight in your attempts to corrupt the land. You must pass a Hard (3d) Discipline (WP) check or devolved into a horrific Chaos Spawn!
